intro:
「A kid could answer that in a second.」
A four-choice knowledge quiz that puts adult pride to the test.
description:
「Quiz: Don't Lose to a Kid!」 is a quiz game where you answer elementary school-level math and science questions by choosing from four options.

「This one's obviously easy.」
That's exactly when you're most at risk.

Arithmetic, units, everyday natural phenomena —
Questions you think you know, but the answer just won't come.

・Elementary level means there's nowhere to hide
・Four choices made by instinct lead to unexpected traps
・Even adults keep going 「Wait, which one was it again?」

When the results are in, you'll be saying:
「How are kids so smart?」
「My knowledge might've stopped growing back then…」

Get ready for a guaranteed laugh.

A knowledge quiz game you can tackle solo or enjoy with family, friends, and on stream.

———————————————
TT supports gameplay streamers.
No permission from TT is required for gameplay streaming, whether personal or commercial.
